trivia_bullets.text: Frenzied Goblin was first printed in Ravnica: City of Guilds (RAV, October 2005) and has been reprinted in: Magic 2015 (M15), Duel Decks: Speed vs. Cunning, Masters 25 (A25), GRN Guild Kit, Jumpstart 2022, Ravnica: Clue Edition, and Foundations (FDN, November 2024) — eight distinct sets across nineteen years. [Scryfall: print history]

Flavor text: "The upside to not thinking about the consequences is that you'll always surprise those who do." [Scryfall]. Same text across all printings from RAV original onward — the flavor has remained constant across the full reprint history. [Scryfall: RAV printing via WebSearch snippet]

Pauper-legal despite the FDN uncommon printing: the card was downshifted from uncommon to common in Masters 25 (A25, 2018, no. 131), and Pauper legality requires only one common printing in a card's history. The {R}-to-prevent-blocking ability is a soft evasion effect that remains a core tool in Pauper Goblins' tempo plan. EDHREC rank 9597. Art in Foundations by Randy Vargas. [Scryfall: A25 printing] [WebSearch: Card Kingdom Blog — Pauper Goblins deck week]
sources: WebSearch: Card Kingdom Blog — Pauper Goblins

trivia_bullets.text: EDHREC tracks Frenzied Goblin across approximately 10,507 Commander decks (0.25% inclusion). Its highest-synergy home is Krenko, Mob Boss (mono-red goblins), appearing in roughly 15% of Krenko lists — the tap-a-blocker ability pairs with Krenko's mass-token swarms. [EDHREC: Frenzied Goblin, via WebSearch snippet]
